subject: IBAS trigger 7015 is not a GRB
body:
S.Mereghetti (IASF-Milano), D.Gotz (CEA, Saclay), 
E.Bozzo, C.Ferrigno (ISDC, Versoix), 
and J.Borkowski (CAMK, Torun) on behalf of the  IBAS Localization Team report:

The IBAS  trigger n. 7015 at 00:08:44 of June 18, 2015 is not due do a 
GRB.  It is due to the source V404 Cyg.
